scripts.setup:ecossistema: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix ..\Financeiro && npm install --prefix ..\Financeiro\backend && npm install --prefix ..\Financeiro\frontend
scripts.dev:ecossistema: concurrently -n escola-backend,escola-frontend,financeiro-backend,financeiro-frontend -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start:dev --prefix ..\Financeiro\backend" "npm run dev --prefix ..\Financeiro\frontend"
scripts.build:ecossistema: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix ..\Financeiro\backend && npm run build --prefix ..\Financeiro\frontend
